title: Migration Wizard
subtitle: Onboard existing data from your prior accounting system
no_access_description: This surface is for CFO, Senior Accountant, and Owner roles. Speak to your CFO if you need to onboard historical data.
readonly_banner: You have read access to the Migration Wizard. Uploading, mapping, and posting require CFO or Senior Accountant role.

step1.title: Pick source system and upload a file
step1.description: Choose the accounting system you are migrating from, the entity type you want to import, and upload the exported CSV.
step1.file_drop_hint: Pick a .csv file exported from your source system (max 5 MB).
step1.file_too_large: File is too large. The wizard accepts CSV files up to 5 MB; split larger exports into multiple files.
step1.file_not_csv: That file is not a CSV. Please pick a .csv file.
step1.upload_failed: Upload failed. Check the file and try again.

step2.title: Review parsed rows
step2.description: The file parsed into the counts below. Move to account mapping when you are ready.
step2.unmapped_codes_title: Source account codes that need mapping
step2.unmapped_codes_empty: No unmapped codes — every line maps to a Haseeb account.
step2.load_failed: Could not load staged rows. Try again.
step2.no_import_job: No import job yet. Go back to Step 1 to upload a file.

step3.title: Map source accounts to Haseeb roles
step3.description: Each code from your source system must map to a Haseeb account role. Accept the suggestion, dismiss it, or pick a role manually.
step3.empty: Every source code is mapped. Move on to batch categorize.
step3.manual_map_hint: Role shortlist — the full role picker needs a backend accounts/roles endpoint (future wire).
step3.load_failed: Could not load source map rows. Try again.

step4.title: Batch categorize similar lines
step4.description: Group suggestions for repeated source codes. Apply in bulk or dive into individual review.
step4.group_prompt: {{count}} lines with code {{code}} — map all to {{role}}?
step4.group_prompt_unmapped: {{count}} lines with code {{code}} — pick a Haseeb role to apply.
step4.apply_failed: Apply failed. Some rows may not have been updated.
step4.no_groups: No group candidates. Either every code is mapped, or no source code repeats ≥ 3 times.
step4.vendor_group_deferred: Vendor-based batch categorize will ship in a future wire (no backend endpoint to bulk-apply vendor → expense-account mapping yet).

step5.title: Post to the live ledger
step5.description: Ready to post: {{invoices}} invoices, {{bills}} bills, {{journalEntries}} journal entries.
step5.summary_partial: {{posted}} posted, {{failed}} failed. Retry failed rows below or reject them with a reason.
step5.no_ready_rows: Nothing is ready to post yet. Complete Step 3 first.

errors.network: Cannot reach the Corporate API. Check your connection.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: Your role does not have permission for this action.
